title: Cost Analysis
subtitle: Track model spend through cost totals, hourly load, daily trends, and cache efficiency.

overview.title: Cost Operating Summary
overview.subtitle: Start with spend, call quality, cache behavior, and latency before drilling into models and providers.

timeline.title: Daily Cost Trend
timeline.subtitle: Aggregate daily spend in the selected window to spot cost spikes and call volatility.

leaderboard.title: High-Cost Models
leaderboard.subtitle: Rank the main spend drivers by cost share so routing and pricing checks start in the right place.

hourly.title: Last 24 Hours
hourly.subtitle: Review hourly tokens, calls, and cache writes to catch short-term load spikes.

providers.title: Provider Cost Mix
providers.subtitle: Roll model spend up to provider level to see concentration and cache behavior.

focus.title: Hourly / Daily Matrix
focus.subtitle: Top-cost models stay in focus so you can compare how each period consumes budget and cache.

table.title: Model Ranking
table.subtitle: Compare cost, success rate, cache gains, and latency for every model in the current window.

charts.dailyCostSubtitle: Spend and traffic aggregated by day across the selected window
charts.hourlyLoadSubtitle: Hourly tokens, calls, and cache write volume

emptyState.title: No model usage data yet
emptyState.subtitle: Once execution records start landing, this page will roll up spend, cache behavior, and hourly or daily usage.
